description: Lock downgraded hard edges from the 25-edge source pass where reviewed sources supported context or scaling rather than strict prerequisites.

checks.reason: Photolithography is the main application context for semiconductor photoresists, not a chemical hard prerequisite.
Integrated-circuit manufacturing scaled semiconductor photomasks, but photomasks are not caused by integrated circuits.
Steam engines powered many central-station dynamos, but generators do not strictly require steam engines.
Integrated circuits were important to later supercomputing scale and packaging, while early supercomputers were not IC-dependent.
